exit 1; 16 tests run, 12 passed, 4 failed. All lifecycle ownership tests passed. T027 stale/reconcile tests passed: status --all marks disappeared owned run as stale; reconcile marks stale runs without killing a new external listener. Remaining failures are events command unknown_command, logs --follow JSONL unsupported/exits, clean --safe retention removing protected log evidence.

concerns.summary: events --json remains unimplemented and fails with unknown_command.
logs --follow --json remains unimplemented and exits before emitting JSON Lines, including the redaction follow case.
clean --safe retention still removes or fails to preserve recovery evidence; clean retention is outside T027.
git status reports the scoped source files as untracked under the broader parent git root, so git diff did not show tracked hunks.

recovery_hints: T028 should add the events command and logs --follow JSONL streaming/redaction behavior without changing T027 reconcile semantics.
T031 should implement safe-clean retention for running logs, latest failed logs, and failure-linked events.
Do not use reconcile as a process kill path; stale repair should remain state/event-only.

consumer_evidence.validation: status --all marks a disappeared owned run as stale with reconcile and inspect next actions
reconcile marks stale runs and leaves a new external listener on the same port running

must_preserve_evidence.MP-007: Reconcile remains daemonless and CLI-only; no process service or external kill path was added.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-009: Stop/restart ownership gates are unchanged and lifecycle ownership tests pass.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-012: Stale run evidence remains inspectable; stale records are updated in state and events rather than silently deleted.

consequence_obligations.CA-CP-009: Readiness remains distinct from liveness; status derives stale from dead owned PID while reconcile explicitly persists stale repair.
consequence_obligations.CA-CP-011: Inspect/status continue to aggregate registry, run index, local state, and OS liveness evidence with safe next actions.
consequence_obligations.CA-CP-017: Reconcile does not kill external or unknown listeners and preserves recovery evidence through run state and run.stale events.
